name: Web Server Component
description: The `web_server` component creates a simple web server on the node that can be accessed through any browser and a simple [REST API](https://esphome.io/web-api#api-rest). Please note that enabling this component will take up *a lot* of memory and may decrease stability, especially on ESP8266.

config_entries.label: Auth
config_entries.description: Enables a simple *Digest* authentication with username and password.

config_entries.label: Password
config_entries.description: The password to check for authentication.

config_entries.label: Username
config_entries.description: The username to use for authentication.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for code generation.

config_entries.label: Compression
config_entries.description: The compression algorithm used for embedded web assets when `local` is enabled. Options are `gzip` or `br` (Brotli). Brotli provides smaller embedded web assets (~10% smaller than gzip), but some browsers only support Brotli over HTTPS connections. Since ESPHome devices typically serve over HTTP, gzip is recommended for maximum compatibility. Defaults to `gzip`.

config_entries.label: Css Include
config_entries.description: Path to local file to be included in web server index page. Contents of this file will be served as `/0.css` and used as CSS stylesheet by internal webserver. Useful when building device without internet access, where you want to use built-in AP and webserver.

config_entries.label: Css URL
config_entries.description: The URL that should be used for the CSS stylesheet. Defaults to [https://oi.esphome.io/v1/webserver-v1.min.css](https://oi.esphome.io/v1/webserver-v1.min.css) (updates will go to `v2`, `v3`, etc). Can be set to empty string.

config_entries.label: Enable Private Network Access
config_entries.description: Enables support for [Private Network Access](https://wicg.github.io/private-network-access) and the [Private Network Access Permission Prompt](https://wicg.github.io/private-network-access/#permission-prompt). Defaults to `true`.

config_entries.label: Include Internal
config_entries.description: Whether `internal` entities should be displayed on the web interface. Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: Js Include
config_entries.description: Path to local file to be included in web server index page. Contents of this file will be served as `/0.js` and used as JS script by internal webserver. Useful when building device without internet access, where you want to use built-in AP and webserver.

config_entries.label: Js URL
config_entries.description: The URL that should be used for the JS script. Defaults to [https://oi.esphome.io/v1/webserver-v1.min.js](https://oi.esphome.io/v1/webserver-v1.min.js). Can be set to empty string.

config_entries.label: Local
config_entries.description: Include supporting javascript locally allowing it to work without internet access. Defaults to `false`.

config_entries.label: Log
config_entries.description: Turn on or off the log feature inside webserver. Defaults to `true`.

config_entries.label: OTA
config_entries.description: Explicitly disable OTA updates through the web server interface. Only accepts `false`. This option is typically used when you have both `web_server` and `captive_portal` configured, and you want OTA updates to be available only through the captive portal. Since `captive_portal` automatically loads the web server OTA platform, setting this to `false` prevents OTA access through the regular web interface while maintaining it for captive portal access. To enable OTA for web server, use the `web_server` OTA platform instead.

config_entries.label: Port
config_entries.description: The port the web server should open its socket on.

config_entries.label: Sorting Groups
config_entries.description: Available only on `version: 3`. A list of group ID's and names to group the entities. See [Webserver Entity Grouping](https://esphome.io/components/web_server#config-webserver-grouping).

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID used for the group.

config_entries.label: Name
config_entries.description: A string representing the group name which is displayed as the header of the group

config_entries.label: Sorting Weight
config_entries.description: A float representing the weight of the group. A group with a smaller

config_entries.label: Version
config_entries.description: `1`, `2` or `3`. Version 1 displays as a table. Version 2 uses web components and has more functionality. Version 3 uses HA-Styling. Defaults to `2`. Version 1 is deprecated and will be removed in 2027.1.0; please migrate to version 2 (the default) or version 3.
